EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED: Email is already registered. Please use another email or sign in.

ACCOUNT_ALREADY_VERIFIED: This account has already been verified.

CLASS_ACCESS_DENIED: You do not have permission to access this class.
CLASS_NOT_FOUND_OR_INVALID_CODE: Class not found or class code is invalid.

ROLE_ALREADY_SET: Your role has already been set.
SAVE_TEST_PERMISSION_DENIED: You do not have permission to save the test for this class.
GOOGLE_ID_TOKEN_MISSING: No Google ID token was received.
GOOGLE_EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Google account email is not verified.
INVALID_TOKEN_SESSION: Invalid token or session. Please sign in again.
